game_info.title: Summit Ascent
game_info.concept:
Help Madeline survive her inner demons on her journey to the top of Celeste Mountain, in this super-tight platformer from the creators of TowerFall. Brave hundreds of hand-crafted challenges, uncover devious secrets, and piece together the mystery of the mountain. Help Madeline survive her inner demons on her journey to the top of Celeste Mountain, in this super-tight, hand-crafted platformer from the creators of multiplayer classic TowerFall.



  • A narrative-driven, single-player adventure like mom used to make, with a charming cast of characters and a touching story of self-discovery
  • A massive mountain teeming with 700+ screens of hardcore platforming challenges and devious secrets
  • Brutal B-side chapters to unlock, built for only the bravest mountaineers
  • IGF “Excellence in Audio” finalist, with over 2 hours of original music led by dazzling live piano and catchy synth beats
  • Pie
The controls are simple and accessible - simply jump, air-dash, and climb - but with layers of expressive depth to master, where every death is a lesson. Lightning-fast respawns keep you climbing as you uncover the mysteries of the mountain and brave its many perils.

This is it, Madeline. Just breathe. You can do this.
game_info.description: Ascend the treacherous Summit. You play as Madeline, a climber battling her inner demons and the mountain itself. Master the art of jumping, wall-climbing, and mid-air dashing to navigate through dangerous spikes, crumbling platforms, and mysterious caverns. Collect strawberries for extra challenge and reach the flag at the peak to conquer the mountain.
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Keys: Move left/right, aim dash, look up/down
- Space: Jump (hold for higher jump), Wall Jump
- Z: Dash (can dash once in air, refills on ground)
- Shift: Grab/Climb walls (hold while against a wall)
- Enter: Start Game
- Esc: Pause/Unpause
- R: Restart Game (from Start or Game Over screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Verifies basic platforming physics including gravity, collision, and jump mechanics.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The automated controller will move the player right and perform periodic jumps to traverse the initial flat terrain and clear the first obstacle. It ignores collectibles.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player successfully moves across the screen, jumps over the first pit/spike, and lands safely without falling through the floor or getting stuck in walls.
TEST_1.description: Verifies basic platforming physics including gravity, collision, and jump mechanics.

TEST_1.expected: The player successfully moves across the screen, jumps over the first pit/spike, and lands safely without falling through the floor or getting stuck in walls.

TEST_2.test_description: Verifies the win condition and complete level traversal capabilities.
TEST_2.strategy_description: A "god mode" AI with perfect knowledge of the map navigates the player directly to the goal coordinates, using dashes and wall climbs optimally to bypass all hazards.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The player reaches the summit flag, triggering the "GAME_OVER_WIN" state, displaying the victory screen and final score.
TEST_2.description: Verifies the win condition and complete level traversal capabilities.

TEST_3.test_description: Verifies death mechanics and hazard collision.
TEST_3.strategy_description: The controller purposely walks the player into the first available spike hazard.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: The player dies upon contact, triggering the respawn or "GAME_OVER_LOSE" sequence correctly.
TEST_3.description: Verifies death mechanics and hazard collision.
TEST_3.strategy: The controller purposely walks the player into the first available spike hazard.
TEST_3.expected: The player dies upon contact, triggering the respawn or "GAME_OVER_LOSE" sequence correctly.

TEST_4.test_description: Verifies dash mechanics and stamina system.
TEST_4.strategy_description: The controller jumps and dashes repeatedly in the air to ensure dash limits are enforced, then lands to verify refill.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Player dashes only once in mid-air, color changes (red/blue) to indicate state, and stamina drains while climbing.
TEST_4.description: Verifies dash mechanics and stamina system.
TEST_4.strategy: The controller jumps and dashes repeatedly in the air to ensure dash limits are enforced, then lands to verify refill.
TEST_4.expected: Player dashes only once in mid-air, color changes (red/blue) to indicate state, and stamina drains while climbing.

TEST_5.strategy_description: The controller navigates specifically to intersect with a Strawberry entity.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: The strawberry disappears upon collision, particle effects spawn, and the score increments in the game state.
